name: core-isolation
description: ADR-0002: src/core is the UI-agnostic in-app module (log discovery, parsing, DB access). It must never import the Next.js/React UI stack so it stays reusable and server-only.

rules.message: src/core must not import next/react/react-dom (ADR-0002): keep the core UI-agnostic. Move UI concerns into src/app or src/components.
